description_long: This is a bald adult male figure dressed in rugged, utilitarian clothing suitable for urban or outdoor environments. He wears a long-sleeve pullover with the sleeves pushed up, dark cargo pants, and sturdy lace-up boots. Accessories include a crossbody strap with a pouch, a holster or sheath on his right thigh, and fitted gloves on both hands. The figure's posture is upright with arms slightly extended, suggesting readiness or alertness. The facial expression is neutral, and the overall build is average and athletic. The materials and textures suggest a realistic human form with fabric, leather, and synthetic elements for clothing and accessories.
description: A bald adult male in rugged, utilitarian clothing with gloves, boots, and accessories, standing upright and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, facial features, crossbody strap, pouch, gloves, and holster clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the holster on the right thigh, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the crossbody strap, and the fit of the clothing and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, gloves, and the holster's position relative to the leg.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve pullover, cargo pants, utility gloves, crossbody strap with pouch, holster, lace-up boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
